title: oldenlandia echinulosa var. pellucida
intro: Oldenlandia echinulosa var. pellucida is a variant of the Oldenlandia echinulosa plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine, particularly in China and Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, improving respiratory health, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. Oldenlandia echinulosa var. pellucida is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in capsule or tablet form as a dietary supplement.
